nl_query: How many deadline extensions were requested versus approved this quarter?
failed_sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN der.approval_status = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS approved_extensions, COUNT(CASE WHEN der.approval_status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS pending_extensions FROM deadline_extension_request der JOIN board b ON b.id = der.board_id WHERE b.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS' AND b.academic_year = :academic_year
